catalyst.event: Geely 1H 2026 interim results — key disclosure of Galaxy/Zeekr brand consolidation synergies, EV gross margin trajectory, and full-year volume guidance revision after Q1 2026 record monthly deliveries
catalyst.source: HKEX filing schedule; management Q4 2025 call indicated Zeekr privatization synergies to be quantified at interim

rightIf_conditions: 1H 2026 interim NI ≥10.5B CNY (implying ≥24% YoY on clean comparable base)
Group consolidated operating margin in 1H 2026 ≥6.5% (vs 5.0% live TTM)
Management raises FY2026 volume guidance by ≥5% at interim or quarterly update
Consensus FY2026 EPS revised up by ≥10% within 30 days of interim release
wrongIf_conditions: 1H 2026 group gross margin <17.0% (flat or down vs current TTM 17.0%)
Monthly EV deliveries (Galaxy + Zeekr combined) decline QoQ for two consecutive months in 2H 2026
Geely loses ≥300bp NEV market share to BYD QoQ (per watchlist wrongIf signal)
what_changes_our_mind: 1H 2026 interim results show consolidated gross margin <17.0% (i.e., flat or down vs current TTM) AND operating margin <5.5% — would signal price-war pressure overwhelmed Zeekr synergy benefits, invalidating the operating leverage thesis.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes FY2025 NI flatness (+0.2%) means growth has peaked → We believe it's a one-off base effect masking accelerating operating earnings → Mechanism is Zeekr consolidation synergies + Galaxy mix lift surfacing in clean 1H 2026 comparables.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +30% to +45% (target 29.5-33.0 HKD on 11-13x fwd P/E × upgraded EPS)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -15% to -20% (downside floor 18.0-19.5 HKD on 7x trough multiple if margin disappoints)
